# Number Theory — Standalone Curriculum Spec

## 1. Overview

**Purpose:** A self-contained, standalone Number Theory course with structured lessons, tiered practice (easy/medium/hard), and unit quizzes.  
**Entry point:** `number-theory.html` (generated by `build-number-theory.js` from source HTML).  
**Data source:** Inline `NUMBER_THEORY_CURRICULUM` array in `number-theory.html`, built from `/Users/robn/Downloads/number-theory-curriculum.html` with injected `deeperLinks`.  
**Relation to other offerings:**

| Offering | Type | Entry Point |
|---|---|---|
| Essential Math Primer | Sequential K–12 lessons (15 min each) | `primer.html` |
| Algebra I / II, Geometry, Trigonometry, Linear Algebra | Full curricula (11–13 units each) | `algebra-i.html`, etc. |
| **Number Theory Curriculum** | Full course: 12 units, lessons + practice + quiz | `number-theory.html` |
| Topic Library | Individual topic walkthroughs/practice | `math/<topic>/` |

---

## 2. Data Model

### 2.1 Unit object

Each item in `NUMBER_THEORY_CURRICULUM` has:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | number | Unit number 1–12 |
| `title` | string | Unit title |
| `obj` | string | Learning objectives summary |
| `deeperLinks` | array | `{ label, url }` — injected by build; cross-links to `math/<topic>/walkthrough.html` |
| `prs` | array | `{ id, text }` — prerequisite background notes |
| `ls` | array | Lessons; see §2.2 |
| `pr` | array | Practice questions; see §2.3 |
| `qz` | array | Quiz questions; see §2.4 |

### 2.2 Lesson object (`ls[]`)

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `t` | string | Lesson title |
| `c` | string | Lesson content (HTML) |
| `f` | string[] | Formula strings (monospace) |
| `ex` | object | Optional `{ p: string, s: string[] }` — worked example problem and steps |

### 2.3 Practice / Quiz

Same shape as other curricula: `d` (easy/medium/hard), `q`, `o`, `c`, `x`. Quiz same minus `d`.

---

## 3. Units

| # | Unit Title |
|---|---|
| 1 | Divisibility & the Division Algorithm |
| 2 | Greatest Common Divisor & the Euclidean Algorithm |
| 3 | Primes & the Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic |
| 4 | Modular Arithmetic |
| 5 | Linear Congruences & the Chinese Remainder Theorem |
| 6 | Fermat's Little Theorem & Euler's Theorem |
| 7 | Multiplicative Functions & Perfect Numbers |
| 8 | Primitive Roots & Discrete Logarithms |
| 9 | Quadratic Residues & Legendre Symbol |
| 10 | Quadratic Reciprocity |
| 11 | Continued Fractions & Diophantine Equations |
| 12 | Cryptographic Applications |

**Totals:** 12 units, 24 lessons, 84 practice questions, 60 quiz questions.

---

## 4. App State & Persistence

- **localStorage key:** `number-theory-progress`
- **Shape:** `{ answers, quizSubmitted, completedUnits }`. Quiz key per unit: `<unitIndex>-qz`. Score ≥ 60% → unit marked completed.

---

## 5. Build

- **Script:** `build-number-theory.js`
- **Source:** `NUMBER_THEORY_SOURCE` env or default `/Users/robn/Downloads/number-theory-curriculum.html`
- **Output:** `number-theory.html`
- **Injection:** Unit ends in source are `]},\n// ═══════════` (8 equals; units 1–11) and `]}\n];` (unit 12). Script injects `deeperLinks` before each unit’s closing `},` or `};`.

---

## 6. Integration Points

- `primer.html`: "Also Try" includes Number Theory card → `number-theory.html`.
- `index.html` header tagline: includes link to `number-theory.html`.
- Theme: wine (`#7a2e3a`, `#5e2230`). Respects `mathbored-theme` from localStorage.

---

## 7. Relation to Other Curricula

| Aspect | Algebra I/II, Geometry, Trig, Linear Algebra | Number Theory |
|---|---|---|
| Entry point | algebra-i.html, etc. | number-theory.html |
| localStorage key | algebraI-progress, etc. | number-theory-progress |
| Units | 11–13 | 12 |
| Accent | blue / purple / teal / copper / sage | wine |
| Level | K–12 / high school / college | College |

All are standalone curriculum pages with shared header/footer, progress persistence, and "Go Deeper" links where applicable.
